name: R8左轮手枪 | 头骨粉碎者
nameZh: R8左轮手枪 | 头骨粉碎者
descriptionEn: The R8 Revolver delivers a highly accurate and powerful round at the expense of a lengthy trigger-pull. Firing rapidly by fanning the hammer may be the best option when point-blank stopping power is required. It has been hand painted with yellow flames and red and white accents. \"Open wiiiiide\"
descriptionZh: R8左轮手枪有着高度精准且极具杀伤力的子弹，但代价是扳机拉动时间较长。在需要近距离火力压制的情况下，用手扳动击锤快速射击或许是最佳选择。 枪身手绘了黄色的火焰以及红白色的符号. \"吃我一枪\"
